summary: Build a modern minimalist jewellery e-commerce web app with full storefront, cart/checkout, product pages, and an admin/seller dashboard for product uploads; full-stack Next.js with Supabase/Firebase, cloud image storage, auth, SEO, and production-ready structure.
architectural_notes: Prefer Next.js for the React framework.
Use Supabase or Firebase for database + authentication.
Store product images in cloud storage (e.g., Supabase Storage/Firebase Storage).
Checkout includes Stripe integration placeholder (Stripe-ready, not full payment implementation yet).
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Minimalist jewellery brand wordmark logo in black on transparent background (logo-wordmark.dim_512x256.png)
- Soft luxury hero banner photo-style image of jewellery on beige/white background with ample whitespace (hero-banner.dim_2400x1200.png)
- Set of four minimalist category tiles/icons for Rings, Necklaces, Earrings, Bracelets in neutral beige/black line style (category-icons-set.dim_1024x256.png)

existing_features.title: Create a cohesive minimalist luxury UI theme across the app using a clean white + beige palette, elegant serif headings, modern sans-serif body text, generous whitespace, subtle hover states, and smooth micro-animations; ensure the design is mobile-first and fully responsive.

Implement admin/seller authentication and authorization using Internet Identity: require login for the Admin Dashboard; restrict product create/update/delete actions to an admin allowlist of principals stored in backend.

Support product image upload for admins: allow attaching multiple images to a product via the Admin Dashboard and render those images on the storefront. Store uploaded images on the Internet Computer (in-canister) and serve them back to the frontend via a backend HTTP interface or query endpoints; include reasonable file type/size validation and clear error messaging.

Build the Homepage UI with: hero banner featuring a large jewellery image, featured products section, category section (Rings/Necklaces/Earrings/Bracelets), testimonials section, Instagram-style gallery preview, and a footer with contact + social links.
Build the Shop page with a responsive grid layout, category filter (Rings/Necklaces/Earrings/Bracelets), sort by price (ascending/descending), and an Add to cart action per product.

Build the Product Detail page that includes: large image gallery with zoom, product description, price, Add to cart, reviews section UI, and related products section populated from the catalog (e.g., same category).
Implement a Cart page with editable quantities, remove item, and total price calculation; cart state should persist across page refreshes in the browser.
Implement a Checkout page with a shipping form (validated inputs) and a payment integration placeholder that is clearly marked as "Stripe ready" without performing real payment processing.

Build an Admin Dashboard UI that allows admins to create, edit, and delete products; fields must include title/name, description, price, category selection, and image upload; the dashboard must remain simple, clean, and consistent with the overall minimalist aesthetic.

Add performance and UX enhancements: smooth route/section loading states, subtle page/element transitions, image lazy loading for product grids and galleries, and user-friendly error states for failed network calls.

Add basic SEO/accessibility foundations: per-page document titles and meta descriptions, semantic headings, accessible form labels, keyboard navigable controls, and meaningful alt text for product images (fallback if not provided).
Provide a production-ready project structure and an in-repo README that explains local development, building, deploying to the Internet Computer, and how to configure the initial admin principal(s).

new_feature_requests.summary: Create core storefront pages (Homepage, Shop grid with category filter & price sort, Product detail with image zoom, Cart with quantity edit/remove/total, Checkout with shipping form and Stripe-ready placeholder) with minimalist luxury responsive UI.
Implement Admin/Seller dashboard with secure authentication to create/edit/delete products, upload images, set price/description/category.
Set up backend database and cloud storage for products and images (Supabase or Firebase) and integrate with frontend.
Add UX/performance enhancements: smooth animations, subtle hover effects, loading animations, image lazy loading, form validation, and error handling.
Add SEO optimization, production-ready folder structure, and README deployment instructions.

Implement a backend product catalog API in the single Motoko actor: create/read/update/delete jewellery products with fields: id, name/title, description, price, category (Rings/Necklaces/Earrings/Bracelets), images (one or more), createdAt/updatedAt; persist data in stable storage so it survives upgrades.

projectName: Minimalist jewellery e-commerce storefront with admin product management
